creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

Thanks. Specifically, include a mention of duplicating what  https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/usr.sbin/freebsd-update?id=f28f138905416c45ebaa6429f44a0b88a72f54b1 and https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/usr.sbin/freebsd-update?id=e01e8f911b935eabcc35b4d121951e4e21042ee5 (both MFC'd to 13-stable and present in 13.1) can do automatically. Is that what you meant?
